tools.name: start_pie_session
tools.description: Launch a Play-In-Editor (PIE) session to test gameplay. Requires Developer security mode. After starting, use read_message_log to check for runtime errors, simulate_input to interact, and stop_pie_session to end.

start_mode.description: Where to start the player (default: default_player_start)

tools.name: simulate_input
tools.description: Inject keyboard or gamepad input during an active PIE session. Use to test movement, abilities, and interactions. Common keys: W/A/S/D for movement, SpaceBar for jump, LeftShift for sprint, E for interact.

action_type.description: 'press' = tap (down+up in one frame), 'down' = hold, 'up' = release (default: press)

duration.description: Duration to hold the key in seconds (0-10). Note: for sustained input, use 'down' then 'up' in separate calls.

tools.name: stop_pie_session
tools.description: Stop the current Play-In-Editor session. After stopping, use read_message_log to review any runtime errors that occurred during play.
